description.ko: 에메랄드빛 막을 통해 흐르는 생체 발광 수액이 액체 빛처럼 순환하는 AURA-7의 미시적인 생명력을 깊이 있게 묘사합니다.
description.en: A deep dive into the microscopic life-force of AURA-7, where bioluminescent sap flows through emerald membranes like liquid light.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Chlorophyll Pulse.' A vast, living network of #7FB069 emerald moss-membranes and #2D5A3D forest-green vascular structures suspended in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid. Flowing ribbons of #FFE66D golden bioluminescent nectar move like viscous liquid silk through semi-permeable cellular walls. Macro photography focus on translucent textures and internal capillary systems. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh. 8k resolution, serene organic flow.
